title: Build an app from your phone in AI Studio
summary: Google AI Studio enables users to build custom applications directly from a mobile browser using voice commands and API integrations. The tutorial demonstrates creating an image-generation app without installing software, with code generated in real time through AI reasoning.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial demonstrates building a custom application in Google AI Studio directly from a mobile browser, using voice commands and APIs rather than installed software. The walkthrough creates an image-generation app, with AI generating the code in real time. The takeaway: app construction can run entirely from a phone, with voice input driving code generation on the fly.
